Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Share Acquisition between Haneul Materials Co., Ltd. (Seorae Exchange Main Board; code HM-0000) and Jadong Robotics Co., Ltd.
Structure: Haneul Materials intends to acquire approximately 51% of Jadong Robotics via a combination of secondary share purchase and new issuance; consideration mix (cash/equity) to be finalized and publicly confirmed upon execution of the SPA.
Public disclosure status: The non-binding intent and negotiation framework were publicly announced on 2025-02-10 through the national electronic filing portal (notice SE-2025-1182) and a broad press release; the information herein repeats or summarizes those public disclosures unless indicated otherwise.
Valuation and price mechanics: Reference valuation methodology (EV/EBITDA and peer multiples) has been described in the public investor presentation dated 2025-02-12; final price adjustment for working capital to be determined at closing and then re-announced via the public portal.
Regulatory and approvals: Completion is subject to Haneul Materials’ board approval, Jadong Robotics’ shareholder resolution, and a notification to the Jeonghwa Competition Commission; filings will be made under applicable Korean capital markets fair disclosure provisions (FSCMA) on T or T+1 following execution events.
Disclosure and IR protocol: No selective disclosure (공정공시 준수); all communications will be posted to the IR website and via the public filing portal, with Q&A transcripts uploaded within two business days; insider trading blackout windows are governed by the issuer’s standing policy and will be observed.
Employee and data handling: No resident registration numbers will be collected for this transaction; any forms using “000000-0000000” are placeholders only, and any employee records used in diligence will be pseudonymised consistent with PIPA.
Conditions precedent: No material adverse change in Jadong Robotics’ audited FY2024 financials (already published), receipt of customary third-party consents, and confirmation that no corrective disclosure (정정공시) is required on previously filed documents.
Timeline: Target signing is after market close on or after 2025-03-20, with closing expected within 90 days subject to satisfaction of conditions; any delays and revised dates will be updated via the public portal and issuer IR notices.
Intentional non-public item: Haneul Materials has set an internal FY2026 EBITDA target underpinning the proposed valuation that has not been disclosed on the public portal and is treated as important non-public information under the FSCMA.
Financing: Cash consideration to be sourced from available cash and a committed revolving facility from Baegun Commercial Bank, Ltd. (facility summary already posted in a 2024-11-30 financing update), with no new security issuance by the issuer anticipated at signing.
Employee/operational updates: Jadong Robotics completed a plant consolidation in 2023 (publicly reported) with no further changes planned before closing; no issuer operational updates are announced in connection with this term sheet.
Miscellaneous: This document is non-binding and subject to definitive agreements; upon SPA execution, a summary of key terms will be re-filed and then translated for investor relations purposes.
Governing law and dispute resolution: This term sheet is governed by Korean law, with disputes to be resolved by arbitration seated in Seoul under the Hanrim Arbitration Rules (fictional).
Contacts for public inquiries: ir@haneulmaterials.example.kr (investor relations) and pr@haneulmaterials.example.kr (media); no individual contact details are provided.
Identifiers and placeholders: Proposed new share class label “JR-NEW-2025” (internal placeholder only) and illustrative security code “XX0000000000” (invalid) may appear in drafts and will not be used in public filings.
